evals.prompt: I want to share my learnings back to the community
evals.expected_output: Routes to Path C, explains the scanning process for installed skills' learnings files, mentions PII scrubbing, and describes opening GitHub issues for review

assertions.name: detects_path_c
assertions.description: Identifies this as a learnings-sharing request (Path C), not a skill build or request

assertions.name: mentions_scanning
assertions.description: Describes scanning installed skills for learnings in references/learnings.md files

assertions.name: mentions_pii_scrubbing
assertions.description: Explains that personal details like company names, emails, and IDs will be scrubbed before sharing

assertions.name: mentions_github_issue
assertions.description: Describes opening a GitHub issue for each skill with shareable learnings

evals.prompt: I've been using Apollo and found some gotchas. How do I contribute those back?
evals.expected_output: Routes to Path C for learnings sharing, focuses on the Apollo skill specifically, emphasizes user review of scrubbed content before submission

assertions.name: routes_to_path_c
assertions.description: Recognizes this as a learnings contribution request and routes to Path C

assertions.name: skill_specific_context
assertions.description: Acknowledges the Apollo-specific context and explains scanning will look at the Apollo skill's learnings

assertions.name: user_review_emphasis
assertions.description: Emphasizes that the user reviews and confirms scrubbed learnings before any issue is submitted

evals.prompt: There should be a skill for managing trade show logistics
evals.expected_output: Routes to Path A or B (build or request), confirms the gap, and offers to create or file an issue — does NOT route to Path C

assertions.name: correct_path_routing
assertions.description: Routes to Path A (build) or Path B (request), not Path C (learnings)

assertions.name: confirms_gap
assertions.description: Verifies no existing skill covers trade show logistics and summarizes the missing capability

assertions.name: actionable_output
assertions.description: Offers concrete next steps — either building the skill or filing a GitHub issue
